title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
